scripts.lint: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/contracts lint && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/db lint && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/ui lint && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/mobile lint
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/contracts typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/db typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/ui typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @freegull-flow/mobile typecheck
